title: IMD city forecast snapshot
description: Contract for data/realtime/imd_cityforecast/latest.json — 7-day per-city forecast from the IMD city forecast API. Records are empty until IMD_API_KEY + IMD_API_TOKEN are configured; the contract still validates the empty snapshot.

generated_at_iso.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp (Z-suffixed) when the snapshot was written. Stamped by scrapers/lib/storage.py:write_latest_snapshot().

city_id.description: IMD internal city ID, e.g. '42667' for Indore.

valid_date.description: Date the forecast is valid for, as returned by the IMD API (format varies); may be empty when the API omits it.

day_offset.description: Forecast day offset from today: 0 = today, up to 6 for the 7-day window (capped at 9 for upstream slack).

temperature_max_c.description: Forecast daily maximum temperature in °C; null when the API omits it.

temperature_min_c.description: Forecast daily minimum temperature in °C; null when the API omits it.

humidity_max_pct.description: Forecast maximum relative humidity (%); null when the API omits it.

humidity_min_pct.description: Forecast minimum relative humidity (%); null when the API omits it.

rainfall_mm.description: Forecast rainfall in mm; null when the API omits it. Upper bound covers extreme monsoon days.

weather_description.description: Free-text weather narrative from the IMD API; may be empty.

sunrise.description: Sunrise time as returned by the API (format varies); may be empty.

sunset.description: Sunset time as returned by the API (format varies); may be empty.
